case_title: CREDIGY RECEIVABLES INC. VS. TERRELL PICKETT et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-23-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
